pages.text: Sore pads is not a disease, but a condition a cat can develop after wearing down their paw pads for climbing too much, running too much, or being on hard or abrasive surfaces. A cat that steps on a burning surface can also get sore pads.$(br)
pages.title: Sore Pads
Sore Pads
pages.text: Dock Poultice is excellent for Sore Pads and other minor injuries. Apply this on a cat's paw pads and it will help heal.$(br)

pages.title: Sore Pads
pages.text: While Yarrow is the most disgusting of herbs... It can still be chewed into a poultice and applied on a cat's paw pads.$(br)
